ops.body: P2 rollout verified on this host (2026-07-13): synckitd 0.9.0 + reposync 0.14.0 via brew; manifest backend=fsnotify; fsnotify "watching dir" lines for all reposync leaf dirs + cookiesync profile dirs; watchman watch-list has ZERO synckit roots (17 total, all git-hook repo roots, reaped daily per idle_reap_age_seconds=86400); deleted-leaf recovery verified live ("rewatching dir" for .git/logs/refs/remotes/origin within one sweep). Nuance on the converge legs: watch-triggered converges log nothing at Info (reposync.log/reposync-watch.log are dead pre-synckit relics, last written Jun 24-27), so leaf-touch/nested-ref converges are verified indirectly — event delivery via the -race -count=10 suite on both platforms plus the live recovery fire (identical onEvent path), converge plumbing via the 15-min reconcile ("reposync: reconciled" post-upgrade). FINDING logged separately: recursive fsnotify blew synckitd fds to ~63k (56k files + 7k dirs) by descending cookiesync's browser profile trees — kqueue charges per entry; limit is 245k so no outage; fix belongs in cookie-sync WatchDirs scoping.
